stemHtml: The horn balance is used for aerodynamic balancing. It consists of...

options.a: a tab which is moved by control input from the pilots.
options.b: a tab which moves opposite to the movement of the rudder.
options.c: a surface area in front of the hinge line to protrude into the airflow.
options.d: a surface area behind the hinge line to protrude into the airflow.
